data.title: [Cleanup] House palette: consolidate to canonical light/deep pairs from individual pages

data.to:
**[CRITICAL CLEANUP — blocks FRAC-23 and FRAC-19]**

The site has 4–5 conflicting palettes per house, surfaced by FRAC-21 audit (synthesis: `.lattice/notes/FRAC-21-team-review-20260605-1551.md`). User decision: **canonical = the pairs currently used on each individual house page** (background color + FractalPattern overlay color). All other palettes get retired.

## Canonical pairs (light, deep)

Per-page values currently shipping (verified `src/pages/*.tsx`):

| House id | Light | Deep | Currently shipped as |
|---|---|---|---|
| campus | `#2E6B4A` | `#1A3A2E` | bg=light, pattern=deep |
| neighborhood | `#889460` | `#4A5A30` | bg=light, pattern=deep |
| events | `#D4857A` | `#C13B2A` | bg=light, pattern=deep |
| lab | `#E870A0` | `#C44878` | bg=light, pattern=deep |
| people | `#C49040` | `#B65D19` | bg=light, pattern=deep |
| story | `#D4BA58` | `#8A7A20` | bg=light, pattern=deep |
| forum (Political Club) | `#C83858` | `#6E1830` | **bg=deep, pattern=light** (inverted treatment) |
| school (Liberal Arts) | `#B52828` | `#5C1010` | **bg=deep, pattern=light** (inverted treatment) |

Note: Political Club and Liberal Arts ship with the deeper of the pair as the page bg — a moodier treatment. Both light and deep are valid surfaces; the per-page decision of which is bg vs accent is allowed to differ.

## What changes

1. **`src/data/houses.ts`** — replace the single `color: string` field on each House with `palette: { light: string; deep: string }`. Delete the old "Fractal Bright" hex values (`#8B7355`, `#E07A5F`, `#457B9D`, `#1D3557`, `#CC2936`, `#6B4C9A`) — they survive only in dead code (`FractalObject.tsx`, retired separately in FRAC-25) and as misleading fallbacks.

2. **`src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx` `sectionLinks`** — derive colors from `HOUSES[id].palette`, not from local `sectionLinks` literals. Pick `.deep` or `.light` per design intent (Navbar currently uses what reads as the deep hue for most houses).

3. **`src/components/house/HouseBanner.tsx` `ELEGANT_PAIRS`** — replace with derivations from `HOUSES[id].palette`. Banner bg = `.light`, letter color = `.deep` (matching current usage except for forum/school which keep their inverted treatment).

4. **`src/components/three/OctahedronHero.tsx` `NAV_NODES` + `FACE_SECTION_COLORS`** — same: derive from `HOUSES[id].palette`. (Per FRAC-20, the tint values themselves are in-flux at `needs_human` — this task standardizes the SOURCE; the deeper tint-strength question is owned by FRAC-20.)

5. **`src/components/ui/AvatarBadge.tsx:24`** — currently reads `house?.color`. Switch to `house?.palette?.deep ?? "#171717"`. The cool-slate fallback `#6B7280` is out-of-system; replace with the warm system equivalent (foreground charcoal).

6. **`src/pages/*Page.tsx`** — keep the page bg/pattern literals for now (they ARE the source of truth this task is consolidating around). In a follow-up, replace literals with `style={{ backgroundColor: HOUSES.campus.palette.light }}` etc. — but verify no visual regression first.

7. **`src/pages/BadgePlayground.tsx:14`** — same fix as AvatarBadge.

## Acceptance criteria

- `HOUSES` data model exposes `palette: { light, deep }` for all 8 houses (including hidden forum/school)
- Zero references to the old "Fractal Bright" hex values (`#8B7355`, `#E07A5F`, `#457B9D`, `#1D3557`, `#CC2936`, `#6B4C9A`) anywhere in `src/` (except possibly `FractalObject.tsx` if not yet deleted via FRAC-25)
- Navbar, HouseBanner, OctahedronHero derive house colors from `HOUSES[id].palette` (no inline literals duplicating palette values)
- AvatarBadge falls back to a warm-system value, not Tailwind cool slate
- Visual smoke test: no page changes color (the canonical pairs are the values currently shipped)

## Blocks
FRAC-23 (gap analysis) — DESIGN.md must canonicalize ONE house palette, not four

## Cites
FRAC-21 synthesis §H1 "House accent color has no single source of truth"

data.body:
Review (orchestrator, fresh context): clean execution. New HousePalette interface + 6 palette pairs added to HOUSES (story/people are not Houses — stay as page-local literals, correctly). Navbar, HouseBanner, OctahedronHero, AvatarBadge, BadgePlayground all derive from HOUSES[id].palette via helper functions. Legacy color field deprecated, not deleted. Build + typecheck + tests pass; baseline preserved.

Judgment calls noted:
(a) OctahedronHero forum face kept as #8a7a6a desaturated (existing comment explains — face has no nav node, intentionally de-emphasized). Acceptable exception.
(b) Lab folder #6B4C9A references out-of-scope — filed as separate task.
(c) **Eyeball needed:** HouseBanner school banner letter goes from #E63636 (bright) to #5C1010 (deep) — consistent with canonical pair but loses the deliberate 'bright letter for image overlay readability' choice. May need touch-up after visual smoke test.
(d) AvatarBadge fallback #6B7280 → #171717 — clean.

Branch frac-24-house-palette-sot ready.
